rationale: The only linkage evidence is a single DOI-matched reference entry, with no in-text citation context or quoted surrounding text to show how it is used. The cited paper focuses on discrete positive emotions and prosocial giving to distant others, while the citing paper focuses on failure messaging, hostility, and masculine brand preference, so direct substantive dependence is not evident from the notes alone. Because the evidence is sparse and does not make a clear incidental-only case, this pair is best marked uncertain.
